overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding a red Arch motorcycle through the Badlands desert wasteland toward Night City. The journey begins on abandoned concrete structures, transitions through dirt roads and desert landscapes with power lines and wind turbines, and ends on paved highways with light traffic approaching the city skyline.

events.description: motorcycle descends from concrete platform via wooden ramp to lower level
exits concrete structure onto open dirt wasteland

agents.ego_description: riding the red motorcycle across the graffiti-covered concrete platform and descending a wooden ramp to the dirt ground below

entered.detail: abandoned concrete rooftop with graffiti and industrial debris
concrete walls covered in colorful spray paint tags
large reddish rock formations and cliffs in the distance
large metal crane structure extending over the canyon
wooden ramp leading down from the platform

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an abandoned concrete rooftop platform covered in graffiti, with industrial structures and canyon rocks visible. The motorcycle drives across the platform and descends a wooden ramp, transitioning from the concrete structure onto the open dirt wasteland below.

agents.ego_description: speeding along the dirt road through the desert wasteland with the distant city skyline visible ahead

entered.detail: unpaved desert road with tire tracks and scattered rocks
tall metal electricity pylon with multiple cables
scattered desert trees with spiky branches
futuristic skyscrapers and towers of Night City on the horizon
scattered boulders and rock outcrops along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle travels along a dirt road through the open desert wasteland. Power lines and Joshua trees line the route while the distant Night City skyline remains visible on the horizon. The terrain is flat with scattered rocks and sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: roadside with abandoned vehicles and guardrails

events.description: passing abandoned vehicles parked on the roadside
transitioning between dirt and paved road sections

agents.ego_description: navigating past abandoned vehicles and alternating between dirt paths and paved road sections with metal guardrails

entered.detail: derelict cars and trucks left on the roadside
metal safety barriers along the road edge
asphalt road surface with painted markings
large advertising signs along the highway

segments.scene_description: The route passes by abandoned vehicles and transitions between dirt and paved surfaces. Metal guardrails appear along the roadside, and large billboards become visible in the distance. The terrain remains desert-like with power lines running parallel to the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding desert approach to Night City with billboards

events.description: passing the Night City sign indicating 1.5 miles to the city center
motorcycle performs a boost jump over a road section

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the winding road, passing billboards and the Night City sign with the skyline growing larger ahead

entered.detail: large highway sign reading 'NIGHT CITY 1.5' with decorative metal frame
tall windmills with circular blades generating power
tall green cactus plants along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The road winds through the desert with frequent billboards and wind turbines visible. The Night City sign appears on the right, confirming the approach to the metropolis. The motorcycle boosts over a section of road, and the city skyline becomes more prominent against the mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved highway with active traffic approaching the city

events.description: crossing an intersection with other vehicles present
black car passes on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: riding on the paved highway, navigating through light traffic and crossing intersections while approaching the city

notable_agents.action: black car driving in the opposite direction, passing the motorcycle on the left

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt highway with clear lane markings
yellow and white painted lines dividing the road
vehicles driving in the opposite direction on the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a fully paved highway with active traffic. The motorcycle crosses an intersection and shares the road with other vehicles, including a black car that passes on the left. Guardrails and billboards continue to line the route as the city approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an abandoned industrial rooftop through a desolate desert wasteland and onto a bustling highway leading toward Night City. It begins on a graffiti-covered concrete platform before descending a wooden ramp to transition onto a flat dirt road lined with Joshua trees and power lines. As the motorcycle progresses, the terrain shifts from raw earth to a mix of paved surfaces and metal guardrails, passing abandoned vehicles and distant billboards. The scene then opens up to reveal wind turbines and the Night City sign as the bike boosts forward, bringing the city skyline into sharper focus against the mountains. Finally, the route merges into a fully paved highway with active traffic, weaving past other vehicles and under towering billboards as the metropolis looms ahead.
